title: Celestial Power applies Atk Hit and SPD plus eight

card.rawText: This card cannot be negated when played. Atk: +8. Hit: +8. SPD: +8.

plan.title: Celestial Power applies Atk Hit and SPD plus eight
plan.summary: Equip Celestial Power to a primary creature, verify effective SPD gains +8, and run a follow-up battle to verify Hit gains +8.

notes: Place test_primary_creature on player_1 field as primary.

steps: Player 1 plays Celestial Power and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll modifier.
manualVerification: Confirm 002-E01 separately: this card cannot be negated when played.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the while-equipped stat modifiers, not the anti-negation response-window rule.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Celestial Power equipped stat suite.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
